title: Po Po Po Lyrics Manam Kothi Paravai
stanzas:
<div>
Po Po Po Lyrics Manam Kothi Paravai

po po po
nee enga vena po
po po po
nee onnum venaam po

enaku onum kavala illa
podi thangam po
nee yaravena jodi seru
sogam illa po

po po po
nee enga vena po
po po po
nee onnum venaam po

nooru jenmam rani pola
vazhapora poomaane
ennapola evanum illa
 sollapora neethane

pachakili neeye vittuparanthaaye
sollama kollama ennoda
illama thallada vitutiyae

po po po
nee enga vena po
po po po
nee onnum venaam po

thangame ennidam ennakurai kooru
vathiye vittathe kannukullum neeru

ointhidamale siru vayathil
oonjaladinom
maaridamale naduvayathil noolaikodinom
orunaal kooda neengamal
kaeli pesinom

namai veraga paarthorai
yeno yesinom
selvame

po po po
nee koodu vittu po
po po po
nee koorum kettu po

un kalladi pattu
naan kandathila kaayam.
solladi pattu naan
nipathenna nyayam.

kaathalodu neerilidavae
kaavalaginen
kaanalaagi nee paranthidave
saagapogiren

unnai seramal vaazhnthale
yaedhu nimmathi
ennai yerkamal ponale
podi unvidhi unvidhi

enaku onum kavala illa
podi thangam po
nee yaravena jodi seru
sogam illa po

po po po
nee thaalikatti po
po po po
nana vaazhaavetti po.

nooru jenmam rani pola
vazha pora poomaane
ennapola evanum illa
sollapora neethaane.

pachcha kili neeye
vittu paranthaaye
sollama kollama ennoda
illama thallada vitutiyae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Po Po Po'?

The song expresses a carefree and joyful attitude, encouraging listeners to enjoy life without worries.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Manam Kothi Paravai, the song captures a celebratory moment, reflecting the characters' happiness and carefree spirit.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Javed Ali and composed by D Imman.

When was 'Po Po Po' released?

The song was released on April 13, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Po Po Po, the lively beats and cheerful lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of happiness in Manam Kothi Paravai, highlighting the carefree nature of youth. It conveys a message of living in the moment and enjoying life to the fullest. The infectious energy of Javed Ali's vocals, combined with D Imman's upbeat composition, makes this track a delightful experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Po Po Po from Manam Kothi Paravai is a vibrant celebration of joy and energy, perfectly encapsulated by Javed Ali's lively vocals. With D Imman's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious vibe that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Go go go, wherever you want to go, go go go, I don't want anything.
I have no worries, just leave me alone, whoever you are, there is no sadness here.
Like a queen in a hundred lives, you are going away, just like a flower, no one else is saying anything, only you.
Go go go, wherever you want to go, go go go, I don't want anything.
Like a flower, you are going away like a queen in a hundred lives, no one else is saying anything, only you.
You are the green parrot that has flown away, should I say it or not, you have left without me.
Go go go, wherever you want to go, go go go, I don't want anything.
My treasure is with me, don't let it go, even the eyes have tears.
In the small age, we have swung together, in the middle age, we have tied the thread, even on one day, we have spoken without you.
Why do you look at us differently, is there any reason, oh wealth?
Go go go, you leave the house, go go go, you make noise and leave.
I didn't see your eyes, tell me what I should do.
In love, I have been protected, I have seen you, I am going to disappear.
Without you, what is the peace in my life, if I go away, it is your fate, your fate.
I have no worries, just leave me alone, whoever you are, there is no sadness here.
Go go go, you tie the thread, go go go, I will live my life.
Like a queen in a hundred lives, you are going away, just like a flower, no one else is saying anything, only you.
You are the green parrot that has flown away, should I say it or not, you have left without me.
